entities.label: Thorin Giantfriend
entities.summary: Dwarf Fighter raised by hill giants who wields the sentient sunblade Dawnbringer and is gradually hardening morally after months in the Underdark.

entities.label: Daz
entities.summary: Drow Evocation Wizard who escaped Velkynvelve and maintains a load-bearing false identity as a Lolth follower while secretly holding apostate beliefs.

entities.label: Zalthir
entities.summary: Dragonborn Shadow Monk trained by The Garden Shadow who specializes in grapple-and-drag tactics and carries an uninvestigated list of names from Velkynvelve.

entities.label: Grygum
entities.summary: Half-Orc Cleric of Bahamut who serves as the party's moral and emotional anchor and killed Ilvara Mizzrym with a Guiding Bolt.

entities.label: The Ember Vanguard
entities.summary: The player character party operating under this cover name, heroes of Blingdenstone and wanted criminals in Gracklstugh.

entities.label: Glabbagool
entities.summary: Sentient gelatinous ooze companion who gained awareness through demonic influence and underwent a mysterious body swap with the Pudding King.

entities.label: Eldeth
entities.summary: Shield dwarf companion skilled at hiding tracks who has undergone an ideological shift to view the Cult of Lolth, not all drow, as the true enemy.

entities.label: Spiderbait
entities.summary: Surviving goblin web-guide who remained with the party after his partner Yuk-Yuk was murdered by Buppido.

entities.label: Asha Vandree
entities.summary: Drow cleric of Lolth who genuinely believes Daz is a sincere convert and is reshaping the Velkynvelve battle into a Lolth-favorable narrative.

entities.label: Nym Duskryn
entities.summary: Drow mercenary hired on a transactional contract (placed through cutouts) to extract Daz alive; does not know who placed the contract and does not know who Daz is. Sister of Kaelira and Jorlan Duskryn.

entities.label: Kaelira (Duskryn)
entities.summary: Drow mercenary and partner of Nym Duskryn operating under the same contract to extract Daz alive.

entities.label: Jorlan Duskryn
entities.summary: Scarred drow warrior who helped the party escape Velkynvelve (original prison break) out of spite toward Ilvara Mizzrym, his former lover; later surfaced at the Fungal Cavern fight pursuing his own vengeance against her. Estranged brother of Nym and Kaelira Duskryn. No connection to Daz or House DeVir.

entities.label: Ilvara Mizzrym
entities.summary: Drow high priestess of House Mizzrym who commanded Velkynvelve, was corrupted by Zuggtmoy, and was killed by Grygum's Guiding Bolt.

entities.label: JimJar
entities.summary: Deep gnome confirmed to possess divine-level immunities who vanished from existence after winking at the party, implied to be a deity or celestial being in disguise.

entities.label: Stool
entities.summary: Myconid sprout from Neverlight Grove who safely returned home and then departed with Basidia's evacuating loyalist group.

entities.label: Rump-a-dump
entities.summary: Myconid sprout who was recovered uninfected and departed with the myconid evacuation group after leaving Zalthir a self-improvement list.

entities.label: Shuushar
entities.summary: Kuo-toa pacifist monk who guided the party to Sloobludop and then departed to lead a new kuo-toan reformist community on the Darklake.

entities.label: Fuurm "Copper" Coppernose
entities.summary: Human surface-dweller rescued from a Faerzress crystal cave who is searching for his lost sister and is currently traveling with the party.

entities.label: Baedora
entities.summary: Human surface-dweller rescued alongside Fuurm Coppernose from a Faerzress crystal cave and currently traveling with the party.

entities.label: Fargas Rumblefoot
entities.summary: Halfling adventurer rescued from a spider cocoon on the Silken Paths who shared knowledge of the Lost Tomb of Khaem.

entities.label: Zuggtmoy
entities.summary: Demon Queen of Fungi actively expanding her influence through the Underdark and planning to wed the massive fungal entity Araumycos for world-spanning power.

entities.label: Juiblex
entities.summary: Demon Lord of Oozes who was expelled from Blingdenstone and has declared his intent to consume Zuggtmoy's fungal banquet and be reborn at greater power.

entities.label: Demogorgon
entities.summary: Prince of Demons who physically manifested from the Darklake and destroyed Sloobludop, now loose somewhere in the Underdark.

entities.label: Araumycos
entities.summary: A massive sentient fungal entity that Zuggtmoy plans to wed in a ritual that would grant her untold power over the Underdark and surface world.

entities.label: Phylo
entities.summary: Myconid Sovereign at Neverlight Grove who has been corrupted by Zuggtmoy and calls her the Great Seeder.

entities.label: Basidia
entities.summary: Myconid Sovereign who opposed Zuggtmoy's corruption, was grappled to safety by Zalthir, and evacuated from Neverlight Grove with a loyalist group.

entities.label: Sarith
entities.summary: Drow companion whose Zuggtmoy spore infection reached its terminal stage at Neverlight Grove, causing his transformation into a spore servant before being killed by Jimjar.

entities.label: Buppido
entities.summary: Derro serial killer who believed himself divine, murdered Yuk-Yuk, and was ultimately destroyed by Daz's magic missiles in his shrine cave.

entities.label: Derendil
entities.summary: Quaggoth who falsely claimed to be a polymorphed elf prince and was killed by Imbros during the Velkynvelve prisoner revolt.

entities.label: Ront
entities.summary: Orc companion who attacked an injured vrock during the Velkynvelve escape to prove his courage to Gruumsh and was decapitated in return.

entities.label: Hgraam
entities.summary: Venerable stone giant Stonespeaker of Cairngorm Cavern who gifted the party the Stonespeaker Crystal and has sealed his cavern indefinitely.

entities.label: Dorhun
entities.summary: Stone giant apprentice to Hgraam who invited the party to Cairngorm Cavern after the rampaging two-headed giant encounter.

entities.label: Gartokkar Xundorn
entities.summary: Duergar Custodian of the Flame in Gracklstugh who contracted the party to recover the stolen dragon egg and controls Themberchaud through the Keepers of the Flame.

entities.label: Errde Blackskull
entities.summary: Duergar Captain of the Stone Guards in Gracklstugh who hired the party to investigate the Whorlstone Tunnels and may have informed drow pursuers of the party's presence.

entities.label: Themberchaud
entities.summary: Young overfed red dragon Wyrmsmith of Gracklstugh who believes he rules the city but is actually controlled by the Keepers of the Flame and is unaware of the demon-possessed egg.

entities.label: Werz Saltbaron
entities.summary: Duergar merchant targeted for assassination by the Deepking who paid the party an NDA and spell gems and was moved to the assassins' brightlist.

entities.label: Dorbo Diggermattock
entities.summary: Profit-focused leader of Blingdenstone who initially demanded the party deal with the ooze threat before assisting and later agreed to help them reach the surface.

entities.label: Senni Diggermattock
entities.summary: People-focused co-leader of Blingdenstone who advocated for multi-faction cooperation and emerged as a champion of gnome labor rights.

entities.label: Chipgrin
entities.summary: Chief of the Gold Whisker wererat clan in Blingdenstone who allied against the oozes and now controls the upper boroughs as a self-funded defense force.

entities.label: Jadgar
entities.summary: Ghost of a former Blingdenstone defender who is reconstituting the Borough Wardens and holds two unused truthful-answer boons for the party.

entities.label: Kazook Pickshine
entities.summary: Alchemist in Blingdenstone who can convert empty spell gems into powerful magical items and received Ghost Hold Lichen from the party.

entities.label: Pudding King
entities.summary: Insane deep gnome transformed into a sentient telepathic ooze by Juiblex who was defeated by the party and destroyed in his Blingdenstone throne room.

entities.label: Eldgrim
entities.summary: One-eyed duergar leader of the Empty Scabbard assassin guild in Gracklstugh who agreed to cancel Werz Saltbaron's kill contract if the party destroyed the Demogorgon cult.

entities.label: Ploopploopeen
entities.summary: Kuo-toa Archpriest of the Sea Mother in Sloobludop who killed his daughter Bloppblippodd at the altar and whose status is unknown after Demogorgon destroyed the town.

entities.label: Bloppblippodd (Blopp)
entities.summary: Kuo-toa archpriest of the Deep Father whose dying invocation at the altar of Sloobludop completed the ritual that summoned Demogorgon from the Darklake.

entities.label: Brysis of Khaem
entities.summary: Netherese noblewoman whose wraith haunted the Lost Tomb of Khaem until destroyed by Grygum's acid breath and Dawnbringer.

entities.label: Narrak
entities.summary: Derro savant cult leader who was conducting a ritual to give stone giants second heads until killed by Thorin in the Whorlstone Tunnels.

entities.label: Plinki
entities.summary: Derro cultist who attempted to corrupt a stolen dragon egg into a two-headed demonic wyrmling and was killed by Zalthir's fire breath.

entities.label: Xinaya
entities.summary: Drow scout sent by Ilvara Mizzrym to intercept the party at Neverlight Grove who was found fungally corrupted and mercy-killed by Thorin.

entities.label: Yestabrod
entities.summary: Myconid Circle of Masters leader who transformed into a fungal abomination under Zuggtmoy's influence and was killed by Zalthir at Neverlight Grove.

entities.label: Yuk-Yuk
entities.summary: Goblin web-guide who successfully led the party through the Silken Paths and was subsequently murdered in his sleep by Buppido.

entities.label: Dawnbringer
entities.summary: Sentient sunblade recovered from the Lost Tomb of Khaem that deals radiant damage, emits a 20-foot light radius, and refuses to extinguish its light.

entities.label: The Garden Shadow
entities.summary: Ancient monk who trained Zalthir and whose teachings about discipline left a lasting philosophical impression on him.

entities.label: Hemeth
entities.summary: Duergar arms dealer from Gracklstugh who traveled with the party on the Darklake and told them to find him back in Gracklstugh.

entities.label: Welnaste Mizzrym
entities.summary: Drow caravan leader of House Mizzrym who originally sold the party to Ilvara Mizzrym and departed Velkynvelve before the escape.

entities.label: The Matron Mother of House T'sarran
entities.summary: Unknown drow Matron Mother in Menzoberranzan whose kill team was mostly destroyed by the party and who will soon receive word of this via a surviving warrior.

entities.label: House Mizzrym
entities.summary: Drow noble house that operated Velkynvelve through Ilvara Mizzrym and maintains drow caravan operations in the Underdark.

entities.label: House T'sarran
entities.summary: Drow noble house that sent a kill team to the Fungal Cavern (during the final Ilvara fight) which was mostly destroyed by the party, leaving one surviving warrior en route to warn the Matron Mother.

entities.label: House Duskryn
entities.summary: Drow house. Three known siblings: Nym and Kaelira (mercenaries running an extract-alive contract on Daz, placed through cutouts; principal unknown to them) and Jorlan (estranged warrior; originally Ilvara's lover at Velkynvelve, later surfaced at the Fungal Cavern pursuing vengeance against her; no connection to the contract or to Daz).

entities.label: Cult of Lolth
entities.summary: Dominant religious-political force organizing drow society around noble houses in Menzoberranzan, of which Asha Vandree is a genuine devotee.

entities.label: Keepers of the Flame
entities.summary: Psionic duergar faction in Gracklstugh that actually controls Themberchaud and received the mutated dragon egg from the party.

entities.label: Stone Guards
entities.summary: Duergar city guard of Gracklstugh led by Errde Blackskull who are investigating corruption in the Council of Savants.

entities.label: Empty Scabbard / Soulblades
entities.summary: Assassin guild in Gracklstugh led by Eldgrim that was contracted by the Deepking and struck a deal with the party to cancel Werz Saltbaron's kill order.

entities.label: Grey Ghosts
entities.summary: Thieves' guild in Gracklstugh subordinate to the Demogorgon cult that stole the dragon egg and issued a vendetta against the party.

entities.label: Council of Savants
entities.summary: Derro governing body in Gracklstugh that was almost entirely indoctrinated by the Demogorgon cult, with Aliinka serving as a cult operative.

entities.label: Diggermattock Leadership
entities.summary: Governing leadership of Blingdenstone under Dorbo and Senni Diggermattock who are reopening the city for surface trade and agreed to help the party reach the surface.

entities.label: Gold Whisker Clan
entities.summary: Wererat gnome clan in Blingdenstone led by Chipgrin who allied against the oozes and now formally control the upper boroughs as a defense force.

entities.label: Borough Wardens
entities.summary: Ghost organization of Blingdenstone defenders being reconstituted by the ghost Jadgar through training young gnomes.

entities.label: Zuggtmoy's Network
entities.summary: The web of corrupted agents and myconid servants through which Zuggtmoy advances her wedding plan and fungal colonization of the Underdark.

entities.label: Velkynvelve
entities.summary: Drow prison outpost suspended 100 feet up in a cavern where the party was imprisoned, escaped, and later returned to kill Ilvara Mizzrym.

entities.label: Gracklstugh
entities.summary: Xenophobic duergar metropolis afflicted by widespread madness where the party worked simultaneously for multiple competing factions before escaping by boat.

entities.label: Sloobludop
entities.summary: Kuo-toa settlement on the Darklake that was completely destroyed by Demogorgon after the party witnessed the ritual that summoned him.

entities.label: Neverlight Grove
entities.summary: Myconid settlement corrupted by Zuggtmoy through Sovereign Phylo where the party killed Ilvara Mizzrym and from which loyalist myconids were evacuated.

entities.label: Blingdenstone
entities.summary: Deep gnome city recently liberated from the Pudding King's ooze threat where the party are celebrated heroes and which now faces Zuggtmoy's accelerating fungal intrusion.

entities.label: The Darklake
entities.summary: Vast underground water network connecting major Underdark settlements that the party navigated by boat between Sloobludop, Gracklstugh, and beyond.

entities.label: The Silken Paths
entities.summary: Giant spider web network spanning a massive chasm that the party traversed with goblin guides Yuk-Yuk and Spiderbait.

entities.label: Lost Tomb of Khaem
entities.summary: Netherese floating tomb fallen into the Underdark where the party recovered Dawnbringer and destroyed the wraith Brysis of Khaem.

entities.label: Whorlstone Tunnels
entities.summary: Secret Faerzress-suffused cave system beneath Gracklstugh containing a black obelisk, Demogorgon cult operations, and Buppido's shrine.

entities.label: Cairngorm Cavern
entities.summary: Stone giant enclave in Gracklstugh where Stonespeaker Hgraam resides and which has been sealed shut indefinitely.

entities.label: Menzoberranzan
entities.summary: Major drow city dominated by the Cult of Lolth where Daz was trained and where House T'sarran will be informed of the party's actions.

entities.label: The Surface ("The Overbright")
entities.summary: The surface world that is the party's ultimate destination, accessible via a confirmed route through Blingdenstone.

entities.label: Escape to the Surface
entities.summary: The party's primary goal of reaching the surface world via the confirmed route through Blingdenstone with the Diggermattocks' assistance.

entities.label: Zuggtmoy's Fungal Colonization of Blingdenstone
entities.summary: Zuggtmoy is filling the power vacuum left by Juiblex's expulsion, visibly colonizing Blingdenstone with accelerating fungal growth right now.

entities.label: House T'sarran Retaliation Arc
entities.summary: A surviving House T'sarran warrior is en route to inform the Matron Mother of the kill team's destruction, after which a formal kill order against the party is expected.

entities.label: Juiblex's Declared Intent to Consume Zuggtmoy
entities.summary: Juiblex survived expulsion from Blingdenstone and announced intent to consume Zuggtmoy's fungal banquet, setting a course for a demon-on-demon catastrophe.

entities.label: The Araumycos Wedding
entities.summary: Zuggtmoy's central objective to wed Araumycos and spread her spores across the entire Underdark and surface is ongoing with no action yet taken to stop it.

entities.label: Daz's False Identity with Asha Vandree
entities.summary: Daz's load-bearing deception as a Lolth convert with Asha Vandree is at risk from the sustained proximity of drow strangers (Nym, Kaelira, Asha) operating inside drow social ritual.

entities.label: Jorlan Duskryn — Estranged Duskryn Sibling
entities.summary: Jorlan Duskryn is the estranged brother of Nym and Kaelira Duskryn and Ilvara's former lover; he is alive and in transit. The party may have misheard Nym's 'Can I kill your brother?' line (addressed to Kaelira about Jorlan) as referring to Daz; the misunderstanding is theirs to discover.

entities.label: Glabbagool's Ooze Communion / Body Swap
entities.summary: Glabbagool's demonstrated mass-ooze telepathy and mysterious body swap with the Pudding King have unknown lasting metaphysical consequences.

entities.label: Empty Spell Gems / Kazook Pickshine
entities.summary: The party holds unprocessed empty spell gems including a fourth-level gem that Kazook Pickshine in Blingdenstone can convert into powerful magical items before their surface departure.

entities.label: Zalthir's Name List
entities.summary: Zalthir carries an uninvestigated list of names found at Velkynvelve believed to identify people who owe favors, which may prove valuable on the surface.

entities.label: Jadgar's Two Boons
entities.summary: The party has two unclaimed truthful answers from the ghost Jadgar, which could reveal the identity of the Matron Mother of House T'sarran or the status of Zuggtmoy's wedding.

entities.label: Drow Extraction Contract
entities.summary: Nym Duskryn and Kaelira Duskryn hold an active extract-alive contract on Daz, placed through cutouts; the mercs do not know the principal and do not know who Daz is. The contract creates ongoing friction within the party's traveling group.

entities.label: Zuggtmoy Expansion Score
entities.summary: Tracks how close Zuggtmoy is to completing her wedding to Araumycos and colonizing Blingdenstone; currently Elevated with Critical as the next threshold.

entities.label: Juiblex Resurgence Score
entities.summary: Tracks Juiblex's recovery and advance toward consuming Zuggtmoy's fungal banquet; currently Active with Escalation as the next threshold.

entities.label: House T'sarran Retaliation Score
entities.summary: Tracks the progress of House T'sarran's retaliation arc; currently Active with Strike Authorized as the next threshold once the surviving warrior reaches Menzoberranzan.

entities.label: Daz Identity Exposure Score
entities.summary: Tracks the fragility of Daz's false Lolth-follower identity with Asha Vandree; currently Fragile with Collapse as the next threshold.

entities.label: Drow Extraction Contract Score
entities.summary: Tracks pressure from the Duskryn sisters' extraction contract on Daz; currently Active with Forced Extraction as the next threshold.
